description: Insert payload accepted by `BacktestJobRepository::create`. The orchestrator typically builds this from a `JobConfig`; the API layer accepts a `JobConfig` directly and translates.

retryConfig.description: Retry policy applied to transient trial failures (network errors, sandbox-create timeouts). Mirrors Harbor's `RetryConfig`. Pass `null` on the wire (`None` here) to fall back to defaults.

excludeExceptions.description: Exception kinds that explicitly should not be retried even if otherwise matched by `include_exceptions`.

includeExceptions.description: When set, only exception kinds in this list trigger a retry. `None` means "retry every transient kind".

sandboxDriver.description: Sandbox driver picked at submit time. Echoed onto the `BacktestJob.sandboxDriver` column. The orchestrator reads this to pick the implementation behind the `Sandbox` trait (Phase 1).

oneOf.description: Local Docker daemon. Useful for CI + dev loops.
Daytona cloud sandboxes. Default for production.
In-process echo sandbox; powers CLI smoke tests + unit tests without container infra.

title: CreateBacktestJobInput
